## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I discussed this change with the maintainers first.
- [ ] I kept the change focused and architecture-aligned.
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior or public APIs changed.
- [ ] I am the author of this contribution and can complete additional IP paperwork if requested.

## Notes

The project currently keeps a narrow code contribution policy while its legal structure is being finalized.
Unsolicited pull requests may be closed even when technically correct.
